message:
feat(ftui): route in-process output through gated sink (FTUI-03.2.a)

Add output routing contract enforcing the one-writer rule:
- gated_write_stdout/stderr functions with debug_assert guards
- gated_println!/gated_eprintln! macros for command handoff paths
- Replace raw println!/eprintln! in TUI code paths with gated macros
- Route TUI-path eprintln! in main.rs through tracing::error!
- Add debug_assert guards to TerminalSink (replay.rs)
- Fix mutex poisoning in output_gate/terminal_session tests
- Fix pre-existing clippy errors in ingest.rs, secrets.rs, workflows.rs

15 new output_gate tests + state-machine traces + lifecycle tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
